scope: Calculate the von Mises equivalent stress and factor of safety for a 2D plane-stress state using the maximum distortion energy (Hencky-von Mises) yield criterion.

decision_context.system_boundary: Von Mises Stress Calculator evaluates one controlled decision boundary inside Mechanical Design and Manufacturing and excludes broad ERP, dashboard, or multi-module workflows.
decision_context.single_operation_scope: Calculate and evaluate von mises stress using simple mechanical design and manufacturing inputs.
decision_context.decision_owner: operator, engineer, owner_cfo, or checker_auditor depending on selected profile mode
decision_context.decision_after_output: Decide whether to proceed, hold, reprice, reject, repair, inspect, derate, outsource, scrap, rework, or escalate the von mises stress calculator case.
decision_context.cost_of_wrong_decision: Wrong von mises stress calculator result can cause rework, wrong quote, missed capacity, unsafe screening confidence, downtime, cash leakage, or unnecessary escalation.
decision_context.failure_mode_if_formula_wrong: False PASS, false REPRICE, false HOLD, hidden evidence gap, wrong unit conversion, or public formula leakage.
required_source_documents: user-verified source evidence for critical inputs
measurement or quotation record when available
calibration or uncertainty note when measured values are used
excluded_use_cases: replacement for official tax or regulatory advice
field_use_limitations: Exact acceptance limits must come from user-verified project, asset, standard, material, tax, or commercial source.
Public output must not expose internal formula expressions.

irreversible_commitment_metric.description: Von Mises Stress Calculator should not create an irreversible purchase, quote, production, safety, or capital commitment without source verification and review when thresholds are crossed.

standards.name: Maximum Distortion Energy Theory (Hencky-von Mises Yield Criterion)
standards.role: Governing yield criterion for the equivalent-stress calculation

standards.name: ASME BPVC Section VIII Division 2 Part 5 (Design by Analysis - Elastic Stress Analysis)
standards.role: Reference framework for equivalent-stress based structural assessment

standards.name: ISO 12100:2010 (Safety of machinery - General principles for design - Risk assessment and risk reduction)
standards.role: Risk-reduction and factor-of-safety context for mechanical design decisions

standards.name: SI unit system context
standards.role: Unit normalization and unit display consistency

calculation_basis.calculation_character: Protected server-side plane-stress kernel: computes the von Mises equivalent stress from the maximum distortion energy theory, the factor of safety against yield, and the structural decision state (SAFE / MARGINAL / YIELDING).

unit_system.name: SI_BASE_UNITS_WITH_DOMAIN_EXCEPTIONS
unit_system.display_unit_policy: User-selectable display units with base-unit normalization before server execution.

inputs.name: Normal Stress X

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Normal Stress X is below the physically meaningful or operationally permitted lower bound.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Normal Stress X is above the physically meaningful or operationally permitted upper bound.

engineering_range.source: Typical engineering screening band for normal stress x; user must verify against measured or datasheet values.

reference_values.source: Normal Stress X must be verified against the actual stress analysis, FEA result, or datasheet.
reference_values.public_note: Enter the normal stress x for the analysed point, in MPa.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Confirm the source evidence for Normal Stress X.

inputs.user_help_text: Enter the normal stress acting on the X face. Tension positive, compression negative.
inputs.warning_if_missing_or_estimated: If normal stress x is estimated or missing, the server should move the decision to review or blocked according to risk level.

inputs.name: Normal Stress Y

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Normal Stress Y is below the physically meaningful or operationally permitted lower bound.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Normal Stress Y is above the physically meaningful or operationally permitted upper bound.

engineering_range.source: Typical engineering screening band for normal stress y; user must verify against measured or datasheet values.

reference_values.source: Normal Stress Y must be verified against the actual stress analysis, FEA result, or datasheet.
reference_values.public_note: Enter the normal stress y for the analysed point, in MPa.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Confirm the source evidence for Normal Stress Y.

inputs.user_help_text: Enter the normal stress acting on the Y face. Tension positive, compression negative.
inputs.warning_if_missing_or_estimated: If normal stress y is estimated or missing, the server should move the decision to review or blocked according to risk level.

inputs.name: Shear Stress XY

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Shear Stress XY is below the physically meaningful or operationally permitted lower bound.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Shear Stress XY is above the physically meaningful or operationally permitted upper bound.

engineering_range.source: Typical engineering screening band for shear stress xy; user must verify against measured or datasheet values.

reference_values.source: Shear Stress XY must be verified against the actual stress analysis, FEA result, or datasheet.
reference_values.public_note: Enter the shear stress xy for the analysed point, in MPa.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Confirm the source evidence for Shear Stress XY.

inputs.user_help_text: Enter the in-plane shear stress. The sign does not affect the equivalent stress.
inputs.warning_if_missing_or_estimated: If shear stress xy is estimated or missing, the server should move the decision to review or blocked according to risk level.

inputs.name: Material Yield Strength

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Material Yield Strength is below the physically meaningful or operationally permitted lower bound.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Material Yield Strength is above the physically meaningful or operationally permitted upper bound.

engineering_range.source: Typical engineering screening band for material yield strength; user must verify against measured or datasheet values.

reference_values.source: Material Yield Strength must be verified against the actual stress analysis, FEA result, or datasheet.
reference_values.public_note: Enter the material yield strength for the analysed point, in MPa.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Confirm the source evidence for Material Yield Strength.

inputs.user_help_text: Enter the minimum specified yield strength of the material (for example structural steel S235 = 235 MPa).
inputs.warning_if_missing_or_estimated: If material yield strength is estimated or missing, the server should move the decision to review or blocked according to risk level.

inputs.name: Target Factor of Safety

physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_min: Target factor of safety must be at least 1.0.
physical_hard_bounds.semantic_error_message_max: Target factor of safety exceeds the maximum allowed range.

engineering_range.source: Typical design factor of safety against yield for ductile metals; user must verify against the applicable design code.

reference_values.source: Design factor of safety is set by the applicable code or engineering policy.
reference_values.public_note: Required design margin against yield. Defaults to 1.5 when left blank.

evidence_requirement.public_help_text: Confirm the target factor of safety against the applicable design code.

inputs.user_help_text: Enter the required design factor of safety against yield. Leave blank to use 1.5.
inputs.warning_if_missing_or_estimated: If the target factor of safety is missing, a default of 1.5 is applied.

rules.name: Von Mises Stress Calculator evidence and service derating
rules.public_note: Derating is server-owned and must not reproduce restricted tables or hidden coefficients.

formulas.name: Von Mises equivalent stress (maximum distortion energy theory, 2D plane stress)

outputs.name: Von Mises Equivalent Stress
outputs.acceptance_threshold: Must be below yield strength divided by the target factor of safety.
outputs.review_threshold: Approaching the yield strength triggers review.
outputs.failure_threshold: At or above the yield strength indicates yielding.
outputs.public_explanation: Equivalent uniaxial stress from the maximum distortion energy theory for a 2D plane-stress state.
outputs.operator_explanation: Compare this value against the material yield strength to judge structural safety.

outputs.name: Factor of Safety (against yield)
outputs.acceptance_threshold: Should be greater than or equal to the target factor of safety.
outputs.review_threshold: Between 1.0 and the target triggers review.
outputs.failure_threshold: At or below 1.0 indicates yielding / failure.
outputs.public_explanation: Material yield strength divided by the von Mises equivalent stress.
outputs.operator_explanation: A value at or below 1.0 means the material is predicted to yield.

fields.primary_reason: Von Mises Stress Calculator decision is governed by utilization, margin, uncertainty, evidence confidence, and money-at-risk.

user_profile_summary.operator: Proceed only if the server response is PASS and no blocker or critical evidence gap is present.
user_profile_summary.engineer: Review governing driver, uncertainty band, derating, normalized units, and source status before accepting the result.
user_profile_summary.owner_cfo: Use the money-at-risk output to decide whether to reprice, hold, or escalate before commitment.
user_profile_summary.checker_auditor: Verify audit seal, schema hash, proof pack redaction, and source-evidence register.

hidden_risk_explanations: Advisory reference bands can be wrong for the actual asset, jurisdiction, material, or commercial case.
A narrow displayed margin can flip when uncertainty or evidence confidence is updated.
Public proof pack intentionally hides exact formulas; checker trace is restricted to server/admin/test context.
next_best_actions: Verify source evidence for critical inputs.
Review reference-range warnings before accepting PASS.
Escalate if utilization is high or uncertainty crosses the threshold.
Use Pro or expert review for safety, compliance, or high-capital decisions.
fields.premium_unlock_reason: Unlock deeper standard-specific golden tests, controlled formula registry implementation, scenario comparison, and full proof-pack export.

business_impact_contract.public_value_statement: Von Mises Stress Calculator connects technical uncertainty and evidence gaps to money-at-risk before the user commits.
business_impact_contract.premium_unlock_reason: Detailed scenario comparison, standard-specific acceptance logic, and exportable proof pack belong in paid workflow.

states.label: PASS
states.technical_message: Utilization is inside the server-owned pass band.

states.label: REVIEW
states.technical_message: Utilization or uncertainty requires engineering review.

states.label: WARNING
states.technical_message: Margin is thin or a reference range deviation is material.

states.label: CRITICAL
states.technical_message: High utilization, missing evidence, or decision flip risk is present.

states.label: BLOCKED
states.technical_message: Physical bound, missing critical evidence, non-finite output, or redaction failure blocks response.

states.label: PASS
states.technical_message: Evidence and uncertainty are adequate for screening.

states.label: REVIEW
states.technical_message: Evidence confidence or uncertainty needs review.

states.label: WARNING
states.technical_message: Reference deviation or source weakness can flip the decision.

states.label: CRITICAL
states.technical_message: Critical source weakness or high uncertainty exists.

states.label: BLOCKED
states.technical_message: Missing critical evidence or redaction failure blocks public response.

proof_pack.purpose: Generate review-ready engineering evidence for technical checking, internal review, audit discussion, and engineering documentation.
public_report_rules: Do not expose exact formula expressions.
Do not reproduce restricted standard tables.
Do not mention third-party engineering software brands.
Show source context, use scope, limitation, evidence status, protected methodology, result interpretation, uncertainty, and audit seal.

audit_trail_contract.tamper_warning: Changing any input, unit, schema version, formula version, or output invalidates the audit seal.

input_groups.title: Applied Stress State
input_groups.description: Enter the in-plane stress tensor components at the analysed point (MPa).

input_groups.title: Material and Design Margin
input_groups.description: Enter the material yield strength and the required design factor of safety.

reference_code.approved_schema_fetch_path: validated production registry, object storage, or static-approved-schema path; database not claimed unless implemented
reference_code.internal_checker_trace_module: restricted server/admin/test only; never public response
